_schema.description: Product Library - central collection of all products available for assignment to campaigns

product_id.constraints: Non-empty string, must be unique across all products

product_detail_url.constraints: Valid http/https URL, max 2048 characters, or null if not configured

size_guide_url.constraints: Valid http/https URL, max 2048 characters, or null if not configured

short_description.description: Brief product description used in campaign displays

available_sizes.description: List of available size options for this product
available_sizes.constraints: 1-20 items, each item is a non-empty string

available_colors.description: List of available color options for this product
available_colors.constraints: 1-30 items, each item is a non-empty string

url_validation_rules.scheme: Must be http or https only
url_validation_rules.admin_behavior: Admin API rejects invalid URLs with INVALID_URL error code (HTTP 400)
url_validation_rules.frontend_behavior: Buttons hidden for null, invalid scheme, or URLs exceeding 2048 chars
